monetization.ai_disclosure_line: Narration: ElevenLabs Jessica (synthesized voice). Research, scripts, and commentary by Campaign Receipts.

title: LOBBYING ROSE $400M WHILE TRUMP DRAINED THE SWAMP
title_alt: DAY 8: PLEDGE SIGNED. LAST DAY: PLEDGE REVOKED.
BROKEN: DRAIN THE SWAMP — PLEDGE SIGNED, THEN REVOKED
EO 13770 Lasted One Term. Then EO 13983 Erased It.
description:
Drain the swamp was the loudest promise of 2016 — so follow the one piece of paper that actually tried to enforce it, and what happened to it on his last day.

EO 13770 (Jan 28, 2017) — five-year lobbyist ban + lifetime foreign-lobby ban. EO 13983 (Jan 20, 2021) — pledge revoked. Lobbying spend: $3.15B (2016) → $3.53B (2020). The book grades it BROKEN.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=longform&utm_campaign=drain-swamp-v1

#politics #factcheck #trump #2016 #lobbying
